description: Street-level city map with a scanning targeting box highlighting a specific area. Best for zooming into a specific district — crime scene, military base, factory, embassy, data center.

fields.MAP_LABEL_1: City/area key (uppercase): MANHATTAN, DOWNTOWN_LA, CITY_OF_LONDON, PARIS_CENTER, DUBAI_CENTER, TOKYO_CENTER, KYIV_CENTER, GAZA_CITY, ALEPPO, DONETSK
fields.MAP_LABEL_2: Name of the highlighted area, e.g. 'FINANCIAL DISTRICT' or 'NUCLEAR FACILITY'
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: Supporting description, e.g. 'The facility is located 2km from the main checkpoint'
fields.LABEL_2: Label for stat 2, e.g. 'STATUS' or 'ASSET VALUE'
